description: A two-panel side-by-side graphic with bold white text across the top reading THE CHOICE IS YOURS and across the bottom reading SELF-DEPORT WITH THE CBP HOME APP. The left panel shows a person in jeans with hands cuffed behind their back being held by an officer whose vest reads POLICE. The right panel shows a person seen from behind with a backpack and a rolling suitcase ascending an escalator in an airport-like setting.
notable_text: THE CHOICE IS YOURS; SELF-DEPORT WITH THE CBP HOME APP; POLICE
